data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes decision-making time by optimizing options available at a given point.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Predicts the time required to move to a target area on the screen, enhancing usability for touch and click targets.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design with well-spaced interactive elements.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Design takes into consideration the average human's capacity to hold about 7 ± 2 items in working memory.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Applies principles of similarity, proximity, and alignment for visual coherence.
data.technical_spec: Consistent spatial organization and aesthetic design.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic designs are perceived as easier to use, improving user experience.
data.technical_spec: High-contrast colors, intuitive icons, and consistent branding.
